result.stdout:
Description:
  A CLI tool to pack mod source from MSL.

Usage:
  ModShardUnpacker [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name>      Name of the output.
  -o, --output <output>  Output folder. []
  --version              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
